zh.Calverley, North Riding, Yorkshire, Engl: 英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Calverley於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親William Walter de Calverley16歲，母親Lady Joan de Swillington26歲。他與Lady Jursella of Balwearie結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1226年在英國越可爾卡爾福利享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Calverley was born about 1180, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Walter de Calverley, was 16 and his mother, Lady Joan de Swillington, was 26. He married Lady Jursella of Balwearie. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1226, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Calverley est né environ 1180, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Walter de Calverley, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan de Swillington, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jursella of Balwearie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1226, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Calverley, West Yorkshire, England: Calverley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Calverley um 1180 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Walter de Calverley 16 und seine Mutter Lady Joan de Swillington 26. Er hat Lady Jursella of Balwearie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1226 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Calverley, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Jursella of Balwearie. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1226, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Calverleyが約1180年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父William Walter de Calverleyは16歳，母Lady Joan de Swillingtonは26歳であった。Lady Jursella of Balwearieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1226年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Calverley(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Walter de Calverley(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan de Swillington(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Lady Jursella of Balwearie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1226년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Jursella of Balwearie. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Calverley родился около 1180 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Walter de Calverley было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan de Swillington, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jursella of Balwearie. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1226 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
